summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification over 10 open PR candidates. No shared canonical was invented. One security-sensitive PR is routed to central security handling, one contributor PR is planned for superseded closeout against a hydrated maintainer PR, and the remaining PRs are kept as independent or related backlog items because their hydrated state shows proof/check/review/maintainer-decision blockers rather than safe cleanup mutations.

actions.reason: Standalone large feature/refactor PR; not a duplicate or superseded by a hydrated canonical item in this inventory shard.
Related to #72009 on typing TTL, but not a duplicate because it bundles additional Slack, status, context, and compaction behavior.
Standalone lifecycle PR; no hydrated duplicate or replacement PR is identified in this inventory shard.
Not safely closeable as low-signal because low-signal closeout is disabled and the PR has a concrete UI bug claim plus tests; failing checks block merge/fixed-by-candidate closeout only.
The remaining decision is a maintainer correctness/acceptance call; merge is blocked by job frontmatter and no close classification applies.
Related sandbox infrastructure work, but not a duplicate of #68691 or #74083 because it handles config-hash recreation rather than the direct PID-1 reaper behavior.
Standalone behavior fix with author/review follow-up outstanding; no duplicate or superseding hydrated PR is identified.
Open contributor PR is clearly superseded by hydrated maintainer PR #88497, which preserves the same fix direction and adds the broader startup-planning coverage.
Security-sensitive item is out of scope for Clownfish backlog cleanup and must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling without mutating the PR.
Related candidate fix for #76888, but unresolved review findings block merge or fixed-by-candidate closeout.

needs_human: #77904 requires maintainer correctness/acceptance judgment: hydrated state is ready-for-maintainer-look with passing checks and clean later Codex review, but merge is blocked by job mode/frontmatter and latest ClawSweeper still records a needs-changes summary.
